steps.title: Convert pesos to dollars
steps.content:
Multiply the number of pesos by the dollar value of each peso.
$$
8{,}000(0.065)=520.00
$$
Before the fee, the converted amount is $520.00$ US dollars.

steps.title: Apply the service fee
steps.content: A $3\%$ fee means Lina receives $97\%$ of the converted dollar amount. $$ 520.00(0.97)=504.40 $$ The answer is A.
